title: Biden administration announce resources to curb student absenteeism
shortDescription: Members of the Biden administration hosted leaders in education for a summit at the White House Wednesday to address chronic student absenteeism.

title: OnPolitics: Biden and Trump agree to two televised debates
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump agreed Wednesday to debate each other twice, first in June and again in September.

title: Trump and Biden agree on two debates before Election Day
shortDescription: Finally! The Democratic and Republican contenders for the White House will meet face-to-face before Election Day.

title: No, election agency didn't announce fraud in 2020 elections | Fact check
shortDescription: There is no "Electoral Council of the US 2020 Elections." And there is no report from any electoral organization confirming widespread fraud in 2020.

title: Senate intel chair: Foreign adversaries will likely target election
shortDescription: Sen. Mark Warner issues extraordinary warning about foreign meddling in likely rematch between President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump

title: Joe Biden calls out Trump for debate
shortDescription: Joe Biden posted a message for Donald Trump on social media, calling him out to debate and saying he wants to do it twice.

title: Trump trial recap: Michael Cohen faces cross-examination | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Some in GOP are already raising 2024 election doubts. Authorities issue warning that terrorist organizations may target LGBTQ events in June.

title: California bill would ban sale of anti-aging skincare to kids under 13
shortDescription: California Assemblymember Alex Lee has introduced a bill that would ban the sale of anti-aging products to children under 13.

title: Mitt Romney calls Republicans visiting Donald Trump in court 'embarassing'
shortDescription: "It’s a little demeaning to show up in front of a courthouse particularly... where we’re talking... an allegation of paying a porn star," Romney said.

title: Biden wants to transfer $1 billion in weapons to Israel
shortDescription: The latest weapons package includes the potential transfer of $700 million in tank ammunition and $500 million in tactical vehicles

title: Former cop who defended Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, defeated in primary
shortDescription: Harry Dunn, a former cop who defended lawmakers on Jan. 6, 2021 was defeated in the primary for Maryland’s 3rd district.

title: Jill Biden beginning 3-day Michigan tour on Thursday
shortDescription: The first lady, accompanied by VP Kamala Harris' husband, will visit the Upper Peninsula, Midland and Detroit.

title: Biden and Trump agree to June, September debates
shortDescription: President Joe Biden proposed debating Donald Trump twice before the general election — with the first match in June before the start of early voting.

title: 'They should all be executed.' Trump's attacks on judges spur online calls for violence
shortDescription: Trump's broadsides have unleashed a torrent of violent comments from his fans on Truth Social and other sites, experts say.

title: Trump's fast-spreading election doubts raise concerns for Jan. 6, 2025
shortDescription: In 2020, elected officials pushed back when Trump said he might not accept the election results. Now a new set of leaders are echoing his rhetoric.

title: Trump wins Nebraska primary, but Nikki Haley continues to get votes
shortDescription: The former president wins Nebraska GOP primary; surprise as ex-candidate Nikki Haley garners a notable share of the vote.

title: Joe Biden triumphs in Nebraska's Democratic primary
shortDescription: Joe Biden won Nebraska's 2024 Democratic primary, securing the win with significant competition.

title: Rep. Don Bacon fends off GOP hardliner to win Nebraska primary
shortDescription: Bacon will go on to face Democratic state Sen. Tony Vargas, whom he beat by less than two points in 2022.
